consent.agree: I have read and agree to the following:
consent.terms: Agree to the Terms of Service and comply with the platform rules
consent.privacy: Agree to the Privacy Policy and the collection and use of personal data
consent.data: Your data is stored in the cloud and may be accessed across devices
consent.age: I confirm that I am at least 16 years of age
consent.email: Agree to receive account-related notifications via email
consent.noGuarantee: This service is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties
consent.dataLoss: We are not responsible for any data loss due to system failure, maintenance, or force majeure
consent.thirdParty: We are not liable for any issues arising from third-party services (e.g. Google sign-in, email delivery)
consent.changeTerms: We reserve the right to modify the terms of service or features at any time; continued use constitutes acceptance
consent.noLiability: The platform provides no guarantee of data accuracy or analysis results
consent.accountTermination: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate the terms of service
